title: Texas Corgi Blackjack Deck
summary: A full matched SVG playing-card deck for the blackjack trainer, using standard suits and colors with Texas cartoon corgi face cards, pips, and card back.
outcome: Generated 52 individual SVG card faces, one matching card back, a manifest, and a Labs preview page with cowboy hats, bandanas, lone star details, and direct links to every card asset.

title: Blackjack Card Picker
summary: A browser-based blackjack trainer that lets a user pick dealer and player cards, toggle available rules, and get a basic-strategy move recommendation.
outcome: Published an interactive card picker with hand classification, totals, basic-strategy recommendations, fallbacks, random practice hands, and no-real-money guardrails.

title: Blackjack Play Workflow
summary: Build notes for a blackjack assistant workflow that tracks hand state, applies conservative basic strategy, explains the next move, and preserves clear real-money guardrails.
outcome: Published a Labs build log and source workflow with decision tables, hand classification, fallbacks, practice mode, quality checks, and a no-autonomous-gambling boundary.

title: Unread Message Triage Agent
summary: Build notes for a draft-only agent workflow that reviews approved communication sources, identifies critical unread items, and prepares human-reviewed replies without sending texts.
outcome: Published a public Labs build log with privacy boundaries, decision rules, implementation backlog, quality checks, and a redacted unread-message exhibit.

title: Travisty: The Travis Nelsen Story
summary: A public archive and collection form for memories of Travis Nelsen, built from visible Facebook memorial posts and downloaded photo references.
outcome: Published a chronological archive with 115 visible entries, 148 local photos, source links, search and filters, plus a form for collecting additional memories.

title: Lauren Gurgiolo Life Portfolio
summary: A public-facing digital portfolio for Lauren Gurgiolo built from sourced web mentions across music credits, installation records, press, funding documents, and official artist pages.
outcome: Published a self-contained Labs page with a visual hero, narrative threads, 40 filterable timeline entries, source links, and a companion research index.

title: Plan a European Tour
summary: A Dialtones European tour planning microsite with route options, a pitch deck, venue prospects, co-bill targets, grant strategy, map assets, hotels, and PR/radio outreach targets.
outcome: Packaged the tour deck and associated HTML/CSV/Markdown/JSON files into a static microsite with direct links to the five shortlist routes and funding materials.

title: Coder MacBook Neo Setup
summary: A setup case study for installing Coder locally on a MacBook Neo, creating a workspace, and capturing the lessons from the install.
outcome: Installed and bootstrapped Coder, created a template, started a healthy workspace, verified SSH access, and documented fixes for Postgres, Docker, socket, and process supervision issues.

title: ElevenLabs Application Deck
summary: A same-night pitch deck and narrated video built for an ElevenLabs application, using multi-voice AI audio, local slide rendering, timing QA, and a public Labs case study.
outcome: Delivered an embedded 1:46 narrated deck video, synchronized slide cuts, reusable deck frames, and a documented case study for the Labs project library.

title: 15 Second Product Video Creator Asset
summary: How a rough AI product video concept became a polished launch package for platform use through review, iteration, audio testing, proof building, QA, and final packaging.
outcome: Delivered an R1 package with 15 exports for specific platforms, posting instructions, reusable templates, narrative materials, and QA history.

title: R1 Video Reviewer Panel
summary: A reviewer system with clear roles that improved a personal agent promo across craft, platform fit, business clarity, accessibility, and audio identity.
outcome: V19 reached a 9.1/10 average reviewer score, unanimous reviewer preference, and full export QA pass.

title: Labs Site Build
summary: A standalone GitHub Pages lab that separates structured project documentation from the polished Squarespace marketing site.
outcome: Published a project library powered by JSON with search, filters, reusable entry templates, Git history, GitHub Pages hosting, and Squarespace DNS.

title: AI Meetup Captain's Log
summary: A practical log generator for turning what happened at an AI meetup into takeaways, follow up items, and content angles.
outcome: Published a small tool powered by JSON with sample captain's logs, log type filters, a draft form, and reusable prompts for after a meetup.
